languages.text: "Я — не ваш агент, но фигура еще более важная. И я хочу с вами поговорить".
"I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."
languages.original_text: "Я — не ваш агент, но фигура еще более важная. И я хочу с вами поговорить".

traits.locale_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."
"I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."
"I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

languages.text: “我不是你的特工，我的地位远高于此。我想跟你谈谈。”
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: “我不是你的特工，我的地位远高于此。我想跟你谈谈。”

languages.text: « Je ne suis pas votre agente, mais une personne encore plus importante et j'aimerais vous parler. »
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne suis pas votre agente, mais une personne encore plus importante et j'aimerais vous parler. »

languages.text: "Ben ajanın değilim, çok daha önemli bir kimseyim. Seninle konuşmak istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: "Ben ajanın değilim, çok daha önemli bir kimseyim. Seninle konuşmak istiyorum."

languages.text: «No soy agente suyo, sino una figura aún más importante. Quiero hablar con ustedes».
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: «No soy agente suyo, sino una figura aún más importante. Quiero hablar con ustedes».

languages.text: "Ich bin nicht Euer Agent, sondern eine noch bedeutsamere Person. Und ich möchte mit Euch sprechen."
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin nicht Euer Agent, sondern eine noch bedeutsamere Person. Und ich möchte mit Euch sprechen."

languages.text: 「私はあなたの代理人ではなく、もっと重要な存在です。あなたと話す必要があります」
languages.original_text: "I am not your agent, but a figure of even greater importance. And I wish to speak with you."

traits.locale_text: 「私はあなたの代理人ではなく、もっと重要な存在です。あなたと話す必要があります」
